response: {"title":"[v0.89][tools] Add release-surface consistency review check","slug":"add-release-surface-consistency-review-check","labels":["track:roadmap","type:task","area:tools","version:v0.89"],"summary":"Add a bounded reviewer-facing check that compares the root README, changelog, and crate version surfaces for obvious release-story drift before third-party review.","goal":"Give reviewers one small, explicit tooling surface that flags mismatched public release metadata before we hand the repo to outsiders.","required_outcome":"A tracked tooling issue proposal exists for adding a bounded release-surface consistency check and documenting its scope clearly.","deliverables":["bounded issue proposal for the release-surface consistency check","clear acceptance criteria for README/changelog/Cargo.toml parity","explicit non-goals preventing broader release automation creep"],"acceptance_criteria":["the proposal stays bounded to reviewer-facing release-surface consistency checking","the acceptance criteria mention README, CHANGELOG, and Cargo.toml parity explicitly","the non-goals rule out broad release orchestration or automated publishing"],"non_goals":["full release automation","automatic version bumps","broad milestone closeout tooling"],"tooling_notes":["prefer a small deterministic checker over a large release workflow","keep the proof surface easy for reviewers to inspect"]}
